requirement_topic.en: PUCSL / CEB Grid-Connection and Net-Metering / Net-Accounting Requirements
requirement_topic.zh: PUCSL / CEB并网及净计量 / 净计费要求
requirement_topic.zht: PUCSL / CEB併網及淨計量 / 淨計費要求

summary.en: The Public Utilities Commission of Sri Lanka (PUCSL) and Ceylon Electricity Board (CEB) regulate grid connection for distributed solar PV systems including inverter-connected installations. CEB's net-metering and net-accounting schemes require the inverter to meet grid-code parameters including voltage and frequency ride-through, anti-islanding protection, power factor, harmonic limits, and fault-level compatibility for the 50 Hz Sri Lanka grid. CEB approval of inverter technical specifications is required before connection. PUCSL sets the overarching regulatory framework under the Sri Lanka Electricity Act.
summary.zh: 斯里兰卡公用事业委员会（PUCSL）和锡兰电力局（CEB）监管分布式光伏系统（包括逆变器并网安装）的电网接入。CEB净计量和净计费方案要求逆变器满足电网规范参数，包括电压和频率穿越、防孤岛保护、功率因数、谐波限值以及与50 Hz斯里兰卡电网的故障水平兼容性。逆变器并网前需获得CEB对逆变器技术规格的批准。PUCSL依据《斯里兰卡电力法》设定总体监管框架。
summary.zht: 斯里蘭卡公用事業委員會（PUCSL）和錫蘭電力局（CEB）監管分布式光伏系統（包括逆變器併網安裝）的電網接入。CEB淨計量和淨計費方案要求逆變器滿足電網規範參數，包括電壓和頻率穿越、防孤島保護、功率因數、諧波限值以及與50 Hz斯里蘭卡電網的故障水平兼容性。逆變器併網前需獲得CEB對逆變器技術規格的批准。PUCSL依據《斯里蘭卡電力法》設定總體監管框架。

standards_or_laws: Sri Lanka Electricity Act No. 20 of 2009 (as amended)
CEB Net-Metering and Net-Accounting scheme technical requirements
IEC 62116: Test procedure of islanding prevention measures for utility-interconnected photovoltaic inverters

summary.en: China uses GB/T 19939-2005 and NB/T 32004-2018 for PV inverter grid-connection testing, and State Grid / Southern Grid enterprise standards for interconnection parameters including anti-islanding and power quality. These documents target the 50 Hz Chinese grid but with different utility-specific settings and protection relay requirements that differ from CEB specifications.
summary.zh: 中国采用GB/T 19939-2005和NB/T 32004-2018进行光伏逆变器并网测试，并采用国家电网/南方电网企业标准规定并网参数（包括防孤岛和电能质量）。这些文件面向50 Hz中国电网，但具体设定和继电保护要求与CEB规格不同。
summary.zht: 中國採用GB/T 19939-2005和NB/T 32004-2018進行光伏逆變器併網測試，並採用國家電網/南方電網企業標準規定併網參數（包括防孤島和電能品質）。這些文件面向50 Hz中國電網，但具體設定和繼電保護要求與CEB規格不同。

standards_or_laws: State Grid / China Southern Power Grid project interconnection rules

gap.en: CEB requires inverter technical specifications to meet Sri Lanka grid-code parameters for the 50 Hz grid, including specific voltage and frequency window settings, anti-islanding response time, reactive power capability, and harmonic limits. Chinese inverter grid-connection certificates use China-specific utility settings and do not directly satisfy CEB technical review. Exporters must prepare CEB-compatible parameter sheets, anti-islanding test evidence (IEC 62116 or equivalent), and single-line diagrams for CEB review before connection approval.
gap.zh: CEB要求逆变器技术规格满足50 Hz斯里兰卡电网规范参数，包括特定电压和频率窗口设定、防孤岛响应时间、无功功率能力和谐波限值。中国逆变器并网证书采用中国特定公用事业设定，无法直接满足CEB技术审查。出口商须在获得并网批准前，准备符合CEB要求的参数表、防孤岛测试证据（IEC 62116或等效）和单线图供CEB审查。
gap.zht: CEB要求逆變器技術規格滿足50 Hz斯里蘭卡電網規範參數，包括特定電壓和頻率窗口設定、防孤島響應時間、無功功率能力和諧波限值。中國逆變器併網證書採用中國特定公用事業設定，無法直接滿足CEB技術審查。出口商須在獲得併網批准前，準備符合CEB要求的參數表、防孤島測試證據（IEC 62116或等效）和單線圖供CEB審查。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for grid-connected PV installations — CEB technical approval required before energisation; PUCSL regulatory framework is statutory
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for grid-connected PV in China under State Grid / Southern Grid interconnection requirements

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese inverter grid-connection certificates do not satisfy CEB technical review. Prepare CEB-specific parameter sheets, IEC 62116 anti-islanding evidence, and single-line diagrams for CEB approval before connecting any PV inverter to the Sri Lanka grid.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国逆变器并网证书不满足CEB技术审查。在将任何光伏逆变器接入斯里兰卡电网前，需准备CEB专用参数表、IEC 62116防孤岛证据和单线图，以获得CEB批准。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國逆變器併網證書不滿足CEB技術審查。在將任何光伏逆變器接入斯里蘭卡電網前，需準備CEB專用參數表、IEC 62116防孤島證據和單線圖，以獲得CEB批准。
